---
title: "ARIA Xenium Spatial Transcriptomics Analysis"
---

## Project

Differential brain effects of anti-Aβ antibody treatment on Amyloid-Related Imaging
Abnormalities (ARIA) in a mouse model expressing human APOE4.

**Platform**: 10x Genomics Xenium In Situ (480-gene targeted panel)

**Samples**: 6 mouse brains (C57BL/6J with human APOE4 targeted replacement) across 2 slides

| Slide | Sample | Treatment |
|-------|--------|-----------|
| Slide 1 (0021991) | KK4_465 | IgG |
| Slide 1 (0021991) | KK4_492 | Adu |
| Slide 1 (0021991) | KK4_504 | IgG |
| Slide 2 (0021998) | KK4_496 | IgG |
| Slide 2 (0021998) | KK4_502 | Adu |
| Slide 2 (0021998) | KK4_464 | Adu |

## Reports

### Cell type characterisation

- [Cell type overview](20260302-cell_types.qmd) — UMAP, spatial maps, cell type proportions
- [Microglia proportions](20260303-cellType_proportions_microglia.qmd) — Subcluster composition by sample and brain region

### Differential expression (Adu vs IgG)

- [All cell types — summary](deg_analyses/20260306-DEG_summary_allCellTypes.qmd) — Cross-cell-type DEG overview
- [All cell types](deg_analyses/20260304-DEG_allCellTypes_brainRegions.qmd) — Pseudobulk DESeq2 across all cell types per brain region
- [Microglia](deg_analyses/20260303-DEG_MG_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Astrocytes](deg_analyses/20260303-DEG_astrocytes_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Endothelial](deg_analyses/20260303-DEG_ENDOTHELIAL_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Oligodendrocytes](deg_analyses/20260303-DEG_oligo_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [OPC](deg_analyses/20260303-DEG_OPC_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Border-associated macrophages](deg_analyses/20260309-DEG_BAM_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [T cells](deg_analyses/20260309-DEG_TCell_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Choroid plexus](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_CP_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Ependymal](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_Ependymal_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Fibroblast](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_Fibroblast_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Pericyte](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_Pericyte_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [VLMC](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_VLMC_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [VSMC](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_VSMC_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [GABAergic neuron 1](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GABAergicNeuron1_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [GABAergic neuron 2](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GABAergicNeuron2_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [GABAergic neuron 3](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GABAergicNeuron3_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [GABAergic neuron 4](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GABAergicNeuron4_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Glutamatergic neuron 1](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GlutamatergicNeuron1_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Glutamatergic neuron 2](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GlutamatergicNeuron2_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Glutamatergic neuron 3](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GlutamatergicNeuron3_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Glutamatergic neuron 4](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GlutamatergicNeuron4_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region
- [Glutamatergic neuron 5](deg_analyses/20260310-DEG_GlutamatergicNeuron5_brainRegions.qmd) — Per brain region

### Astrocyte reclustering

- [Astrocyte subpopulations](20260305-astrocytes_reclustered.qmd) — Reclustering at resolution 0.3, cluster identity assessment, treatment DE
- [Cluster characterization](20260305-astrocytes_cluster_characterization.qmd) — Canonical markers, proportions, pairwise DE between clusters 0, 1, and 7
- [Cleaned reclustering](20260309-astrocytes_reclustered_cleaned.qmd) — Removal of non-astrocyte contaminating clusters and marker genes; SCTransform and log-normalisation alternatives
- [Astrocyte subcluster proportions](20260310-cellType_proportions_astrocytes.qmd) — Propeller test for subcluster composition differences by treatment and brain region

### Pathway analysis

- [Microglia GSEA](20260223-MG_GSEA_brainRegions.qmd) — Gene set enrichment by brain region (MSigDB M7 Immunologic Signatures)
